items.title: Iran war could make beer and bottled water pricier for Indians
items.dek: Makers of plastic and glass bottles are struggling to access raw materials as the war squeezes supplies.
items.body: Makers of plastic and glass bottles are struggling to access raw materials as the war squeezes supplies.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Arlo Parks: 'I got out of my head and into my body'
items.dek: The singer-songwriter found herself on the dancefloor. On a new album, she asks us to join her.
items.body: The singer-songwriter found herself on the dancefloor. On a new album, she asks us to join her.

items.title: Myanmar's coup leader who set off a brutal civil war is set to become president
items.dek: General Min Aung is set to be chosen as the next president by the newly-elected parliament.
items.body: General Min Aung is set to be chosen as the next president by the newly-elected parliament.
